description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a natural, unfinished wood texture. The front face features four open compartments, divided by horizontal and vertical shelves, providing ample storage space for books, tools, or other items. The sides and back are solid panels, with the back panel appearing slightly lighter and smoother than the rest of the unit. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the object a rustic and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. There are no visible doors, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional design. The open compartments make it easy to access and organize stored items.
description: A rustic, rectangular wooden shelving unit with four open compartments and visible wood grain, designed for practical storage. The solid sides and back enhance its sturdy, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the solid wooden panel with visible grain, no openings or features.
description_view_1: The front view reveals four open compartments divided by horizontal and vertical shelves, highlighting the storage function.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, identical to view 0, displays a solid wooden panel with no openings.
description_view_3: The back view shows a large, uninterrupted wooden panel, slightly lighter in color and texture than the front and sides.
